candidates_considered.story: OKC Thunder clinch #1 seed, Chet Holmgren historic stat line

Top draft pick has problematic old comment resurface

stories.headline: Thunder Lock Up Third Straight #1 Seed as Chet Makes NBA History
stories.editorial_direction: Historic achievement on multiple levels. Thunder join Lakers/Warriors as only teams this century with 3 straight #1 seeds. Chet's stat line is NBA record territory. Focus on the championship defense angle and what this means for playoffs.

tweets.text:
Chet Holmgren vs LAC:

30 PTS
14 REB
5 AST
2 STL
4 BLK
10-13 FG

The first player in NBA history with those numbers on 75+ FG% in under 35 MP.

Deandre Ayton reportedly asks teammates to gently place the basketball directly into his palms during live play

(Via @LakersLead)

key_stats: Chet: 30 PTS, 14 REB, 5 AST, 2 STL, 4 BLK on 76.9% shooting in 31 minutes
First player in NBA history with those numbers on 75+ FG% in under 35 minutes
SGA extended streak to 141 straight games with 20+ points (NBA record)
Only teams with 3 straight #1 seeds this century: Lakers (2008-10), Warriors (2015-17), Thunder (2024-26)
historical_context: If they win one more game, they'll join Bulls (1996-97) and Warriors (2016-17) as only teams with 65+ wins in back-to-back seasons
Thunder have home court advantage throughout playoffs
Last season they went 2-0 in Game 7s at home during championship run
key_moments: Chet scored 24 points in first half
Allowed no fast-break field goals to Clippers
SGA sat out 4th quarter with game decided
cross_connections: Home court proved crucial in 2025 championship - went 2-0 in Game 7s at home
Thunder went 5-5 on road in playoffs vs incredible at home
Paycom Center sold out 41 consecutive games this season
meme_angles: Defending champs making it look easy
Thunder are must-see TV in playoffs
research_notes.where_it_goes: First round starts April 18, likely vs #8 seed from play-in. Championship defense begins with massive home court edge. Can they become first back-to-back champs since 2018 Warriors?
research_notes.playoff_implications: Thunder get home court throughout entire playoffs. Play-in tournament April 14-17 determines their first round opponent. Avoiding Spurs/Nuggets side of bracket until potential Conference Finals

stories.headline: Top Draft Pick Fernando Mendoza Under Fire for Resurfaced George Floyd Comment
stories.editorial_direction: Report the fact, no commentary. Controversial player story gets minimal coverage per rules.

tweets.text:
Fernando Mendoza is under fire after a comment he made on a LeBron James post about George Floyd has resurfaced: 

Mendoza: "You need to explain the context of the first photo of the cop on the man, because you never know what he did wrong 🤷‍♂️"

key_facts: Comment was on 2020 LeBron James Instagram post
Mendoza not attending draft (per earlier reports)

stories.headline: Cade Cunningham Returns from Collapsed Lung, NBA Stat Lines Everywhere
stories.editorial_direction: Multiple solid individual performances worth highlighting. Cade's return is the main story, others are stat porn.

tweets.text:
Cade Cunningham is BACK after a collapsed left lung 🙏

Smooth as ever. Cunningham wastes no time finding his rhythm after missing time since March 19 while recovering from the injury 💪

Cade in his return vs Milwaukee:

13 PTS
5 REB
10 AST
6-11 FG

Leading all guards in double-doubles this season.

Terrence Shannon Jr. vs Orlando:

33 PTS
5 AST
11-14 FG

The first Timberwolf with a 30/5a game on 75+ FG% since DLo in 2022.

cade_return: Missed games since March 19 with collapsed left lung
Leading all guards in double-doubles this season
other_performances: Terrence Shannon Jr: 33 PTS, 5 AST on 79% shooting
Jericho Sims: first Bucks center triple-double since Larry Sanders 2012
research_notes.context: Regular season winding down, players positioning for playoffs

stories.headline: 90th Masters Begins with Star-Studded Field
stories.editorial_direction: Masters starting is news but not dominant story today. Quick setup of field and favorites.

tweets.text: Today at 1:44 pm, Gary Woodland will tee off at The Masters. It's been less than three years since he had a lesion removed from his brain, but the tough journey since has proven that courage and pain can live side by side. His story:

field_details: Scottie Scheffler seeking third green jacket
storylines: Gary Woodland brain lesion recovery story

around_the_league.text:
The Texans have exercised the 2027 fifth-year options on the contracts of QB CJ Stroud and All Pro DE Will Anderson, per source.  

Stroud is now due $25.904M in 2027, while Anderson is due $21.512M.   

Both players are also extension eligible.
Falcons OT Kaleb McGary announced his retirement today, and on the same day, the Falcons reached agreement with former Chiefs RT Jawaan Taylor.

The NBA is looking into what multiple sources say was a strategy mistake by Kings coach Doug Christie on an intentional foul of Seth Curry while leading the Warriors with over 3 minutes left in Tuesday's game:

Source: Eastern Washington's Andrew Cook will enter the Transfer Portal. 

Averaged 15.8 PPG in 2024-25. 

Will need an NCAA waiver.

Jericho Sims vs Detroit:

11 PTS
11 REB
10 AST (career-high)
2 STL

The first Bucks center with a triple-double since Larry Sanders in 2012.
Forward Berke Buyuktuncel got a tattoo to commemorate the Huskers historic season, and then entered the transfer portal a day later.
Arizona St. WR Jordyn Tyson, a projected first-round pick, will hold his own individual workout day for NFL teams on Friday, April 17 at Arizona State.

Taylor Ward vs White Sox:

4-5
3 2B
2 RBI

The second player with 3 soubles in a game this season (both did it today).

This fan travelled all the way from Italy to San Antonio to see Wemby, who is not playing

Bro looks PISSED 😭😭

This is the first time in Nikola Jokic's career that he has won 10 games in a row 😳

(via @MileHighRachel)
